use_cases: Landing page hero sections for SaaS and fintech products
Marketing website banner sections with call-to-action buttons
Product showcase pages with prominent headline and CTA
Portfolio and creative agency landing pages
ai_summary: A marketing hero section component with integrated button variants for CTAs. Features clean, modern design with multiple button style options including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link variants. Responsive layout suitable for SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce landing pages.
